title: erythrococca polyandra
intro: Erythrococca polyandra, also known as the red-stemmed erythrococca, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits associated with Erythrococca polyandra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or decoction, or made into a tincture or powder for medicinal use.
